_schema_note: Employer-keyed evidence store. Generation may ONLY claim facts listed here or in consolidated_profile. Edit truth_limits when your real scope changes.

metrics: reduced guest transition wait time 75% (10 min to 2.5 min)
metric_display: Reduced guest transition wait time by 75%, from approximately 10 minutes to 2.5 minutes, by improving workflow and handoff processes.
Supported 20–30 staff per shift while maintaining clear communication during live technical incidents.
truth_limits: Active Directory: NO experience (confirmed 2026-05) — never claim AD administration, AD-joined support, or AD-based account management.
MFA/SSO: NO experience (confirmed 2026-05) — never claim configuring, enrolling, administering, OR troubleshooting MFA/SSO or any identity provider. Do not surface MFA/SSO as a skill.

User accounts: SUPPORT-LEVEL ONLY (confirmed 2026-05) — onboarding assistance and access-related troubleshooting are OK; do NOT claim account creation, provisioning, permission management, or deactivation (no full account lifecycle).
Microsoft 365: USE + END-USER SUPPORT ONLY (confirmed 2026-05) — do NOT claim M365 tenant/admin-center administration, licensing, or Exchange/Teams/SharePoint admin.

Local Group Policy / GPO: NO experience (confirmed 2026-05) — never claim Local Group Policy Editor, gpedit, per-machine GPO configuration, update scheduling via GPO, or any Group Policy management. Do not surface Local Group Policy as a skill.

Routing tables / network routes: NO experience (confirmed 2026-05) — never claim 'route adjustments', editing routing tables, BGP/OSPF, or gateway-path configuration. Network changes at BEAT THE BOMB were static IPs, DNS records, and local switch/cable settings ONLY.

metrics: coordinated 50+ frontline personnel across multiple service zones
truth_limits: Operations/coordination role — not IT help desk unless framed as transferable customer-service and logistics skills

metrics: completed timed medical assessments in approximately 35% of allotted time

_global_metrics_disabled_note: Metric injection MUST be employer-pinned. Cross-job injection was the source of the 75%-wait-time-under-hotel-job leak; metrics now live only under their owning employer above.
